drop TABLE customer.stg_ino_control_claim_price_t;

	 [icdcmdxcode24] nvarchar(50),
	 [icdcmdxcode25] nvarchar(50),
	 [icdcmpxcode01] nvarchar(50),
	 [icdcmpxcode02] nvarchar(50),
	 [icdcmpxcode03] nvarchar(50),
	 [icdcmpxcode04] nvarchar(50),
	 [icdcmpxcode05] nvarchar(50),
	 [icdcmpxcode06] nvarchar(50),

	 [icdcmpxcode15] nvarchar(50),

	 [icdcmpxcode18] nvarchar(50),

	 [icdcmpxcode20] nvarchar(50),
	 [icdcmpxcode21] nvarchar(50),
	 [icdcmpxcode22] nvarchar(50),
	 [icdcmpxcode23] nvarchar(50),
	 [icdcmpxcode24] nvarchar(50),
	 [icdcmpxcode25] nvarchar(50),
	 [createddate] nvarchar(50)

WITH
	(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	 CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
	 -- HEAP
	)
GO
